eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Grant, NE; at 02:04 AM ON MAR 26, 2026 Effective until 05:04 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Evacuate Hyannis to the Hyannis School. Immediately evacuate the village of Hyannis to the Hyannis School.
